vibe: Late-night grooves: deep house remixes, neo soul, city pop, jazz fusion, and hip-hop heat

tracks.name: Feeling You (Henrik Schwarz Remix)
tracks.reason: Henrik Schwarz remix vibes — adjacent to the deep house and Jimpster/Chris Stussy rotation, with a soulful vocal twist

tracks.name: Superman
tracks.reason: South African deep house king — bridges Kerri Chandler and Osunlade territory with a cinematic edge

tracks.name: Surround Sound (feat. 21 Savage & Baby Tate)
tracks.reason: Lyrical hip-hop with jazz-inflected production — sits alongside the Drake/Larry June rotation with more technical bars

tracks.name: Branches Break
tracks.reason: Electronic jazz trio — bridges the Nujabes/Yussef Dayes lane with a more minimalist, breakbeat-infused approach

tracks.name: Jazzy Night
tracks.reason: Deep cut city pop — adjacent to the Taeko Onuki/Tatsuro Yamashita love, with a jazzier nighttime mood

tracks.name: Lady
tracks.reason: Neo soul cornerstone — connects the Sade and USHER threads with raw, Harlem-infused R&B

tracks.name: Birth Of Creation
tracks.album: Trust In The Lifeforce Of The Deep Mystery
tracks.reason: Cosmic jazz-electronic fusion — if Yussef Dayes went full synth apocalypse. High energy palette cleanser

tracks.name: Prepare
tracks.reason: Organic electronica — sits between &ME and Moderat territory with lush, textural deep house

tracks.name: Ordinary Pleasure
tracks.reason: Chillwave-funk crossover — bridges Parcels and Franc Moody vibes with Bay Area swagger

tracks.name: Last Night A DJ Saved My Life (feat. Anané & Tony Touch)
tracks.reason: NYC house royalty — connects the Kerri Chandler/Ron Trent deep house thread with a Latin-tinged dancefloor classic
